title: Database Performance Correlation (ATP → APM → Logs)
description: Correlates application logs with Oracle ATP database context. Uses trace_id (set as CLIENT_IDENTIFIER in V$SESSION) to link Log Analytics entries with OPSI SQL performance and DB Management AWR reports.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and 'db.target' = 'oracle_atp' or 'db.target' = 'oracle-atp' | stats count as Events, distinctcount(trace_id) as UniqueTraces by 'service.name', level | sort -Events
